title: premna paucinervis
intro: Premna paucinervis, also known as the few-veined premna, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae and is native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Premna paucinervis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment to treat various skin conditions.
